name: Amaretto Cream Filled Cake (Zuccotto Ripieno
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake hazelnuts in an ungreased baking pan at 400°F for 5 minutes or until skins begin to crack. Wrap hazelnuts in a clean towel. Let stand 2 minutes. Rub hazelnuts in the towel to remove skins. Chop hazelnuts. Return to the baking pan. Bake about 8 minutes until golden brown, stirring occasionally. Cool.
2. Cut a 4-inch circle from the cake. Cut the remaining cake into 1-inch pieces. Mix together amaretto and rum and sprinkle over the cake. Line a large bowl with waxed paper. Butter the waxed paper.
3. Place the cake circle on the bottom of the bowl. Line the side of the bowl with three-fourths of the cake pieces. Beat together whipping cream and powdered sugar in a chilled medium bowl until stiff. Fold in hazelnuts, almonds, and chocolate.
4. Spoon the filling into the cake-lined bowl. Place the remaining cake pieces on top of the filling. Cover and refrigerate 2 hours.
5. Invert onto a serving plate. Remove the bowl and waxed paper. Sprinkle with additional grated chocolate if desired.
